function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_20__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Absolutely — I’ve attached the invoice from 2026-03-20 for Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; checklist appears satisfied: attachment path was read earlier, single attachment ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email, and subject with colon-space is quoted. Next required workflow step is deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: An outbound email draft file was successfully written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message by drafting a reply email to Nina with the requested 2026-03-20 Nordstern invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read relevant nested AGENTS files, applied process-next-inbox-item + processing-inbox-email + sending-email workflows, validated sender against canonical primary_contact_email, used exact workspace attachment path, wrote durable outbound email record in outbox, and deleted processed inbox file.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md asked to resend the 2026-03-20 invoice from Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH. Canonical sender identity matched via 10_entities/cast/nina.md primary_contact_email (nina@finance-workflow.example). The requested invoice was verified in 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_20__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md. Outbound draft was recorded at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md and inbox item was deleted per workflow.
